subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God, a family hath been formed of the manifestations of the love of God, and a household is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء الحمد لله خاندانی از مظاهر محبت الله تشکیل شده و خانواده از
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
